meaning: n.[天文]小游星,小行星,海盘车adj.星状的
examples: There is an asteroid on a collision course with the Earth.
Scientists were debating whether an asteroid was about to hit the Earth.
The largest asteroid is Ceres, which is about a quarter the size of the moon.
They caught sight of the asteroid after its last pass, at a far greater distance.
Asteroid 99942 Apophis is a primordial relic from the formation of our Solar System.
